query:
SELECT s.ticker, s.companyName, MIN(hp.date) as first_date
FROM stocks s
LEFT JOIN historicalPrices hp ON s.ticker = hp.ticker
GROUP BY s.ticker, s.companyName
HAVING MIN(hp.date) > '2022-11-08' OR MIN(hp.date) IS NULL
ORDER BY MIN(hp.date) DESC
LIMIT 30;
